name: outcome-engine
description: Turn unclear goals into verified outcomes across research, writing, operations, creative work, personal planning, and software.

interface.shortDescription: Turn unclear goals into verified results.
interface.longDescription: Clarify decisions, write durable briefs, create independent action slices, execute from evidence, and improve the systems behind the work.
defaultPrompt: Grill me on this idea before I commit.
Turn this conversation into an outcome brief.
Run Outcome Engine from idea to verified result.
